name: Can Mali GPU DDKs support Vulkan SC and OpenGL ES SC?
snippet: Answer. Mali GPU DDKs do not support Vulkan SC or OpenGL ES SC directly, but using CoreAVI driver can enable the SC support for Mali GPU DDKs.
